allow: Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const m=d.match\(/<p[^>]*>\([^<]{20,}\)<\\/p>/g\); if\(m\) m.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const m=d.match\(/auth-subtitle[^>]*>\([^<]{20,}\)/\); console.log\(m ? m[1].substring\(0,300\) : 'no match'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const m=d.match\(/auth-subtitle[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]{20,?}\)<\\/p>/\); console.log\(m ? m[1].substring\(0,400\) : 'no match'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const i=d.indexOf\('apply-section'\); console.log\(i > -1 ? 'apply section found at ' + i : 'NOT FOUND'\); const j=d.indexOf\('modal'\); console.log\('modal at', j\); const k=d.indexOf\('ANNUAL_RATE'\); console.log\('ANNUAL_RATE at', k\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ console.log\(d.substring\(1200,1800\)\); }\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 14036 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Port 3000 still in use by PID: $\($p.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 3000 is free" })
